title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at FM Logistic India
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
